ol.li: Zero Checksum: In IPv4, 0x0000 means validation is explicitly skipped by the sender.
Cache Locality: Socket mapping table is pre-allocated and aligned to 64B boundaries to fit in L3 cache lines.
Zero-Copy: No memory copies occur between IP_Layer and Application; only the UMEM frame descriptor pointers are passed.
Endianness: Ports and Length are converted from Network Byte Order (Big Endian) to Host Byte Order (Little Endian).
